case_title: BIRGIT DE FRONDEVILLE VS. LAUREN MICHELLE MENDOZA ET AL

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 59870902) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE FRONDEVILLE, BIRGIT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BIRGIT DE FRONDEVILLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-17-557611 AND CGC-16-554672 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE TWO CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THIS CASE, CGC-16-554672 IS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS ARE IN THIS CASE ONLY. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JULY 19, 2017 SET IN THIS CASE IS NOW APPLICABLE TO BOTH CASES. THE AUGUST 16, 2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET IN CASE 557611 IS VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED/ COURT REPORTER: LAURA REDING, CSR	711

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-557611 WITH CASE CGC-16-554672
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF BIRGIT DE FRONDEVILLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-17-557611 and CGC-16-554672 is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. This case, CGC-16-554672 is the lead case and all further filings are in this case only. The case management conference of July 19, 2017 set in this case is now applicable to both cases. The August 16, 2017 case management conference set in case 557611 is vacated. Moving party to submit order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported/ Court Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711 =(302/hk)

Plaintiffs Notice And Stipulated Motion To Transfer Action For Consolidation
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BIRGIT DE FRONDEVILLE'S Stipulated Motion To Transfer Action For Consolidation is Granted pursuant to the parties' stipulation; plaintiff to pay transfer fees. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley DeYoung, CSR #6780 =302/ru
